<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Subscribers; use Pest\Mutate\Event\Events\TestSuite\StartMutationSuite; use Pest\Mutate\Event\Events\TestSuite\StartMutationSuiteSubscriber; /** * @internal */ final class TrackMutationSuiteStart implements StartMutationSuiteSubscriber { public function notify(StartMutationSuite $event): void { $event->mutationSuite->trackStart(); } }
